meaning: n.[闕ｯ]郤ｳ豢幃ś,辜ｯ荳咏ｾ溷雛蝠｡驟ｮ(蜷怜複諡ｮ謚苓艮)
examples: Objective To assess the curative effect of hepatic cerebropathy with naloxone.
AIM: To observe the efficacy of naloxone treatment of primary brain-stem injury.
Conclusion: Magnesium sulfate and naloxone have obvious effects in treating HIE.
Naloxone comes in a pack containing the drug in syringes and the packs were supplied by the PHA to local health trusts.
